## PiWsConfig.piAuth property

Optional authorizer for the built-in Pi WebSocket route at `${wsPrefix}/pi`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly piAuth?: RequestAuthorizer;
```

## Remarks

This protects the default Pi bridge route only. Use `protectHttpHandler()` or `protectWebSocketBehavior()` for your own custom routes.
